title: Is there anything I can do with this
display_title: Is there anything I can do with this
wikitext:
[]: Is there anything I can do with this?             Quote Post by Clover » Tue Jun 15, 2010 11:34 pm -

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Wed Jun 16, 2010 4:17 am First off the picture is really fucking creepy. just had to get that out the way for me. Second that article seems to be old be cause EoE is not new its old and it appears to be a generic movie advertising website that is full of nothing useful.

[]: But I'm no super-genius... or are I?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Wed Jun 16, 2010 9:18 pm First panel, second column from the left reads "Ayanami-san." I can totally read that after only a week and a half of studying Hiragana. I can read the rest but I don't know enough to translate. GO ME!

[]:             Quote Post by Avatar of Dreams » Wed Jun 16, 2010 9:39 pm First panel: That face doesn't suit you, Ayanami-san. Smile. Second panel: That's better.
